title: Sweet Flaky Light Dutch Dried White Beans Stir-fry
description: This low-calorie-friendly sweet and flaky dish is a delightful twist on traditional stir-fries featuring dehydrated white beans that are tender yet chewy, perfect for a quick and satisfying meal.
instructions: Heat vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add garlic and shallots; sauté until fragrant, about 2 minutes.
Deglaze the pan with soy sauce, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom.
Stir in rehydrated white beans. Cook for an additional minute to allow flavors to meld together.
Reduce heat to medium and continue cooking for another 5-7 minutes until the beans are tender but still slightly chewy.
Remove from heat, stir in sesame oil if using, then season with salt or pepper as needed.
Serve hot, garnished with green onions. Enjoy this snack-like meal!
Note: This dish is best served immediately to maintain its texture and flavor.
